data.body: Round-4: 8f1d PASS(signed) — 3/6 done (4214, 6a89, 8f1d). Remediated r4 blockers: 8d8e verify_record shape-dispatch rule + e4df-provided reducer/event facts stated as dependencies + signing.py:648 text-mode and _engine_support/validate.py signature_findings enumerated as consumers + merged_log_commit derivation defined; ee0b remote-URL/guard env vars named (REBAR_OPCERT_REVIEW_REMOTE_URL/TICKETS_REMOTE_URL/GUARD), statelessness reconciled with sign=True via ephemeral workspace + REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=off + client-persists, error.class closed enum, principal format pinned, guard + never-push ACs; 76d2 hashicorp/random provider declared, materialize precedent corrected to infra/gerrit/, HTTP-API caller restriction via identity policy (no resource policy). Re-running 3.
